title: crotalaria coursii
intro: Crotalaria coursii, also known as Coursii bush, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, Crotalaria coursii has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Crotalaria coursii can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
